name: RSO Binder Design
description: Generate binders using ColabDesign gradient descent-based optimization over many iterations. Represents protein as continuous 20d vector to allow for sequence optimization. Experimentally validated to generate binders with good expression, solubility, and adopting the correct oligomeric state and secondary structure composition.
capabilities: Generate binders using ColabDesign gradient descent-based optimization over many iterations
Represents protein as continuous 20d vector to allow for sequence optimization
Experimentally validated to generate binders with good expression, solubility, and adopting the correct oligomeric state and secondary structure composition

pdbFile.description: Target protein structure in PDB format

targetChains.description: Chain IDs of the target protein

binderLength.description: Length or length range of the designed binder

hotspots.description: Target residues for binder to focus on

numIterations.description: Number of ColabDesign gradient descent optimization iterations

numDesigns.description: Number of binder designs to generate
